title: SKYLEO Desk Lamp - LED Desk Light - 5 Color Modes X 11 Brightness Levels - Adjustable Swing Arm - Timmer & Memory Function - 12W Study Lamp - Black
features: Create a comfortable work environment starting with a desk lamp: The SKYLEO LED Desk Lamp not only offers bright illumination with up to 1300 lumens (112 lamp beads), but also provides various color modles options to keep your workspace vibrant

Personalized lighting, effortlessly yours: Designed with your every need in mind, our desk lamp features an adjustable swing arm and rotatable lamp head, allowing you to easily find the most comfortable lighting angle while avoiding glare

More features: It is not just a desk lamp, but also your life assistant. While bringing you light, it can also be easily connected to any 5V/2A USB port to provide power anytime, anywhere (adapter not included)

Thoughtful design: With the timer function,you can set the lamp to turn off at a certain time, while the memory function retains your last brightness setting, providing you with a personalized lighting experience. 180 cm long USB cable for easy use

Whether it's home office or relaxation: The SKYLEO desk lamp is your go-to choice. Put it on your desk for lighting, or in your living room to create a cozy atmosphere. Even during baby's bedtime, the soft light will nurture their every sweet dream
description: Product Description Previous page Perfect Brightness 3000K~6000K brightness adjustment to give you any brightness you want. Perfect Adjustment The adjustment for every angle to achieve the lighting angle you need to do your job efficiently. Perfect Eye Care Allows provide lighting while operating fine work, keep eyes from getting too tired from the light.
